package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_accepts_more_than_one_body_contract
// Rule intent: Handlers that try to bind or manually parse multiple body DTOs in one request path.
func PositiveGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContract(c *gin.Context) {
	var jsonDTO struct {
		Name  string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
		Email string `json:"email" binding:"required"`
	}

	var formDTO struct {
		Name  string `form:"name" binding:"required"`
		Email string `form:"email" binding:"required"`
	}

	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&jsonDTO); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "json bind failed"})
		return
	}

	if err := c.ShouldBind(&formDTO); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "form bind failed"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"json_name":  jsonDTO.Name,
		"json_email": jsonDTO.Email,
		"form_name":  formDTO.Name,
		"form_email": formDTO.Email,
	})
}
